product_overview: A touch-friendly self-service coffee kiosk that lets customers browse and customize menu items, pay via Midtrans QRIS, and view queue status; includes a Kitchen Display System for baristas and an admin dashboard for operations.
core_goals: Allow customers to start an ordering session from the welcome screen and browse the full menu catalogue
Enable customers to customize products (size, sugar, ice, toppings) and add them to a session cart
Let customers manage their cart, provide a name identifier, and complete payment via QRIS
Provide a public queue/status display so customers can track order readiness
Allow baristas to manage order lifecycle from pending → preparing → ready in the Kitchen Display System
Provide an admin area for operational users to sign in and view dashboard metrics

features.name: Welcome / Start Session
features.description: Entry point for kiosk users to begin a new ordering session and continue to the menu.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See welcome screen -> Start an order -> Navigate to /menu

features.name: Browse Menu & Product Customization
features.description: Customers browse categories and products, open customization, choose options, and add items to their cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /menu -> View categories and products -> Open product customization -> Select size -> Select sugar level -> Select ice level -> Select toppings -> Add item to cart -> Navigate to /cart -> See item with chosen customizations

features.name: Cart Management and Checkout
features.description: Customers review and adjust cart items, enter a name, and initiate payment which completes with a success page and queue number.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> Adjust item quantity or remove items as needed -> Enter customer name -> Navigate to /checkout -> Initiate payment -> Complete QRIS payment -> Navigate to /success -> See payment success and queue number
Navigate to /cart -> Attempt to navigate to /checkout without entering customer name -> See validation error preventing checkout -> Enter customer name -> Navigate to /checkout -> Initiate payment

features.name: Queue Status (Customer-Facing)
features.description: Public queue board that displays order numbers and current statuses so customers can watch progress toward ready.
user_flows: Navigate to /status -> Observe queue list and current statuses -> Wait and observe an order status change from Preparing to Ready

features.name: Kitchen Display System (Barista)
features.description: Barista-facing interface to monitor paid orders and update their lifecycle from pending through ready.
user_flows: Navigate to /kitchen -> View list of pending and preparing orders -> Mark a pending order as preparing -> Mark a preparing order as ready

features.name: Admin Login & Dashboard
features.description: Backoffice area where operational staff sign in to view daily sales and trigger syncs.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Enter admin credentials -> Submit credentials -> On success navigate to /admin/dashboard -> See daily sales data and sync controls
Navigate to /admin -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit credentials -> See authentication error

features.name: Browse Menu
features.description: Customers can browse the menu fetched from Olsera API
user_interactions: Click a product to open customization popup
Select size, sugar level, ice level, and toppings

features.name: Cart and Checkout
features.description: Customers manage their cart and trigger payment process via Midtrans Snap.
user_interactions: Click pay to open payment gateway

features.name: Kitchen Display System
features.description: Baristas manage incoming orders, updating status from pending to preparing to ready.
user_interactions: View list of pending and preparing orders
